ddls:
CREATE TABLE "threat_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat indicator */,
  "indicator_value" TEXT /* Value of the threat indicator (e.g., hash value) */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the threat indicator (e.g., SHA256) */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the threat indicator (e.g., white, gray, black) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the threat indicator (e.g., Azure Sentinel) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the threat (e.g., Malware) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the threat indicator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was received or updated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the threat indicator */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the threat indicator */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threat indicator was last seen */,
  "first_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threat indicator was first seen */,
  "countries" TEXT /* Countries where the threat indicator was seen */,
  "industries" TEXT /* Industries affected by the threat indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threat_indicators_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threat_indicators_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threat_indicators_classification FOREIGN KEY ("classification") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Azure Sentinel) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source and its capabilities */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., open-source, commercial) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., white, gray, black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Malware, Phishing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, threat hunter, incident responder) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threat indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the threat indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_access_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES threat_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threat indicator being shared */,
  "shared_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the indicator */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the indicator is shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the threat indicator was shared */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the share event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_shares_shared_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_shares_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES threat_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threat indicator being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the revision */,
  "revision_author" TEXT /* User who made the revision */,
  "revision_changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_revisions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES threat_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_revisions_revision_author FOREIGN KEY ("revision_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
